name: Cannes Lions Festival pass
description: The main festival pass. Grants access to the Palais, talks, screenings, and the official awards. Register your interest first to unlock the public RSVP forms for many official microsites.
nextAction: Register your interest on canneslions.com so you unlock partner-event RSVPs.

name: Dentsu Beach House
description: Holding-co beach with daily programming, panels, and evening receptions. Open RSVP for general admission; client events are gated.
nextAction: Submit RSVP and select sessions you want to attend.

name: Sport Beach (Stagwell)
description: Athlete-driven activation with celebrity drop-ins, fitness classes, and one of the densest exec attendee lists at the festival. Open RSVP — easy yes for first-timers.
nextAction: Submit RSVP — usually approved within 48h.

name: Pinterest Manifestival
description: Open programming aimed at brand decision-makers. Talks, workshops, and an evening reception slate. Pinterest is unusually open relative to peer platforms.
nextAction: Submit RSVP — pick a featured session.

name: FreeWheel Beach
description: CTV / video adtech focused beach club. Strong attendance from agency video buyers and streaming networks.
nextAction: Submit RSVP, pre-book a meeting via the form.

name: ADWEEK House
description: Adweek's editorial hub — full week of stages, interviews, and an evening party slate. The press lounge becomes an unofficial co-working spot.
nextAction: RSVP and apply for press/exec lounge access if relevant.

name: FQ Beach + Equality Lounge
description: New for 2026. CMO-heavy programming and an Equality Lounge open to all attendees. Pre-register early — capacity is real.
nextAction: Pre-register; CMO Roundtable slots fill fast.

name: Propeller Group fringe events list
description: The definitive directory of 1,100+ third-party events around the festival. Free to browse. Bookmark and check daily.
nextAction: Subscribe to daily digest and shortlist fringe events that match your goals.

name: Tubi Cabana
description: Tubi's beach-side cabana. Strong ad-supported streaming exec mix. Save the date now; full RSVP opens closer to the festival.
nextAction: Add to your save-the-date list — full RSVP opens later.

name: Ad Age Lounge + Lawn Party
description: Ad Age's CMO Roundtable, List Lounge, and the Tuesday-evening Lawn Party — one of the festival's defining trade-press parties.
nextAction: Register for Lawn Party — Lounge is application-only.

name: Microsoft Beach House
description: Heavy Copilot / AI programming throughout the week. One of the top exec densities for AI-adjacent companies. Rep-controlled list — email your Microsoft Advertising rep this week.
nextAction: Email your Microsoft Ads rep: 'Add me to the Cannes Beach guest list.'

name: Spotify Beach
description: Music + creator + CMO density. Closing-night concert is the unofficial peak party of the week. Rep-controlled.
nextAction: Reach out to Spotify Ads rep — the closing concert list closes by mid-May.

name: Amazon Port (A'Maison)
description: Major Amazon Ads + AWS programming. Heavy retail-media energy. Invite via Amazon Ads / DSP rep.
nextAction: Email Amazon Ads / DSP rep for guest-list addition.

name: Havas Café
description: Croisette pavilion open to delegates. Programming opens roughly 6 weeks out from the festival.
nextAction: Bookmark page and re-check weekly through May.

name: Snap @ Cannes
description: Snap's garden + beach combo. Mostly invite-only via Snap Partner / business team. Some public RSVP slots.
nextAction: Ping Snap partner manager; watch microsite for public RSVP windows.

name: TikTok @ Cannes
description: Hybrid invite + public RSVP. The TikTok evening party is a hot ticket — book early.
nextAction: Email TikTok Ads rep + watch @TikTokForBusiness for public RSVP drop.

name: Reddit @ Cannes
description: Reddit Recommends activation. Smaller footprint but high signal for community-driven brands. Invite via Reddit Ads sales.
nextAction: Reach out to Reddit Ads sales rep.

name: Canva Creative Cabana
description: Hybrid invite + public. Creator and SMB-marketer focus. Programming announced rolling — watch Canva LinkedIn.
nextAction: Watch Canva LinkedIn; submit public RSVP when it opens.

name: WPP Beach
description: Holding-co beach. Gated to existing clients, portfolio, and warm intros. Path is relationships: GroupM, VML, Ogilvy, EssenceMediacom senior contacts.
nextAction: Ask your WPP-connected investor for warm intros to events team or senior agency contacts.

name: Publicis Plage
description: Publicis client / portfolio beach. No public form. Best path: Epsilon (Publicis's data/AI arm) partnerships or cold-LinkedIn senior Publicis contacts on the 2026 jury.
nextAction: Cold-LinkedIn senior Publicis France / Epsilon contacts.

name: Google Beach + YouTube Beach
description: Google's flagship beach + YouTube programming. Rep-controlled list — ask your Google Ads / DV360 / YouTube Ads rep to add you explicitly.
nextAction: Email your Google Ads rep: 'Please add me to the Google Beach guest list.'

name: Meta Beach
description: Meta's hotel-anchored beach. Invite via Meta Business Partner or Meta Marketing Partner rep.
nextAction: Ping Meta Business / Marketing Partner rep for invite.

name: LIONS B2B Summit
description: Application-only summit for B2B marketing leaders. LinkedIn-anchored programming. Apply via the Cannes Lions site or your LinkedIn Sales/Marketing Solutions rep.
nextAction: Submit B2B Summit application and ping LinkedIn rep.

name: Digiday Brand Leaders Dinner
description: Curated dinner for ~40 brand-side marketing leaders. Caps fast. Apply early — Digiday vets every attendee.
nextAction: Apply now — limited brand-side seats.

name: Digiday Marketing Leaders Brunch
description: Brunch + small-group conversations with senior marketing leaders. Application-only.
nextAction: Apply — Digiday confirms attendance ~3 weeks out.

name: Digiday Cannes Panel & Cocktail Reception
description: Panel followed by cocktail networking. More open than the dinner but still application-gated.
nextAction: Apply via Digiday events page.

name: Variety @ Cannes Studio
description: Variety's interview studio. Get on the schedule by pitching a story angle to a Variety ad/media reporter — the studio is also a great place to bump into talent + execs.
nextAction: Pitch a story angle to a Variety ad/media reporter.

name: Campaign events programme
description: Campaign's full programme — talks, dinners, breakfasts. Mix of open and application-only.
nextAction: Filter for Cannes-week sessions and apply per-event.

name: Fast Company curated sessions
description: Fast Company's editorial sessions — innovation- and creator-leaning audience. Application-gated.
nextAction: Watch events page; apply when Cannes sessions are listed.

name: Ahoy Club — Cannes Lions yacht fleet
description: Charter listings for the festival week. A 10–14 person yacht dinner for prospects/portfolio is one of the highest-ROI moves at Cannes — ~$15–30k all-in.
nextAction: Browse fleet, request quote — book by mid-May for prime dates.

name: Bespoke Yacht Charter
description: Handles many holding-co yacht dinners. Good operator if you want a fully managed dinner-for-12 with catering and crew.
nextAction: Request quote — confirm catering and crew separately.

name: Carlton Bar (the unofficial 8th list)
description: Late-afternoon / early-evening drop-in spot. No list, no RSVP. The unofficial centre of gravity once the official beaches close at 7pm.
nextAction: Block 5–7pm window for impromptu meetings — text contacts to swing by.
